name: Sheet
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Sheet wrapper composed from the local Base UI Dialog primitive, local shadcn Button and form examples, side variants, shadcn slot classes, and local class canonicalization.

registry.reason: shadcn Sheet composes the local Base UI Dialog primitive instead of upstream Base UI React Dialog.
The Sheet close button and examples use the local shadcn Button styles.
The profile editing examples use local shadcn field grouping.
The profile editing examples use local shadcn input controls.
The profile editing examples use local shadcn label semantics through field labels.
shadcn Sheet uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema side variants and Array helpers used by local examples.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Dialog primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Dialog implementation.
Origin close icon is represented with local static SVG markup in installable Foldkit source.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic RTL example data.

examples.title: SheetDemo
examples.description: Profile editing sheet with local shadcn field and input markup.

examples.title: SheetSide
examples.description: Sheet side variants for top, right, bottom, and left.

examples.title: SheetNoCloseButton
examples.description: Sheet content without the top-right close button.

examples.title: SheetRtl
examples.description: RTL profile sheet with local static translations.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Dialog attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Examples compose local shadcn Button, Field, Input, and Label helpers instead of origin app alias imports.
deviations.rationale: The local registry items preserve the relevant Sheet example structure without bringing origin app aliases into installable source.

deviations.summary: The top-right close icon is local static markup instead of a lucide-react runtime import.
deviations.rationale: lucide-react is not an installable runtime dependency for this registry item.

deviations.summary: The RTL example uses deterministic local Arabic copy instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: The language selector is an origin app dependency and is not needed to preserve Sheet direction, side, and layout behavior.
